title: Import data
description: Bring initial products, customers, suppliers, customer receivables, register opening cash, and fiscal profiles into Puntovivo with reviewable imports isolated to your business.

safety.title: Choose how this file will be used
safety.description: Select a mode before choosing a file. Changing modes clears the current import workflow.

demo.title: Demo data
demo.description: Validate sample or fixture rows without saving any records. The server blocks every commit attempt.

real.title: Real business data
real.description: Create records in this business after preview and explicit confirmation. Use only merchant-owned data.

demoBoundary.title: Preview-only boundary
demoBoundary.description: Demo mode can parse, map, validate, and export issues, but it never creates products, stock, customers, suppliers, customer balances, or register opening templates.
demoBoundary.previewOnly: Demo preview only. Review and export the results; no row can be saved in this mode.

safety.realConfirmation: I confirm that this file contains real business data and that I have a current restore point.

rollback.title: Create a restore point before importing
rollback.description: In the Desktop app, create an encrypted database backup before committing real data. Keep the final report and import ID so the batch remains traceable in the audit log.
rollback.scopeWarning: There is no one-click batch undo. Restoring the backup replaces the whole local database and also removes every sale, setting, or other change made after that restore point.

upload.title: Choose a source file
upload.description: Upload a UTF-8 CSV or an Excel .xlsx file up to 10 MB and 500 data rows. The file stays in this browser until you preview it.

map.title: Map your columns
map.description: Confirm the detected columns. Product name and SKU are required; every other field can be left unmapped.

preview.title: Review before importing
preview.description: Puntovivo revalidates every row on the server and skips existing or repeated SKUs and barcodes.

issues.out_of_range: Value is outside the allowed range
issues.duplicate_file_sku: SKU is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_sku: SKU already exists in this business
issues.duplicate_file_barcode: Barcode is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_barcode: Barcode already exists in this business
issues.concurrent_duplicate: Another import created this product while this import was running
issues.import_failed: The product could not be imported
issues.stock_failed: The product was imported but opening stock could not be recorded

table.previewLimit: Showing the first 100 of {{count}} rows. The summary and import include every row.

report.title: Import complete
report.rollbackReminder: If you must reverse this batch, stop new activity and restore the encrypted backup created before the import. Restoring also removes every later change.

template.sampleDescription: Replace this row with your product data

fileErrors.file_too_large: The file exceeds the 10 MB limit.
fileErrors.empty_file: The file does not contain data rows.
fileErrors.empty_header: Every source column needs a header.
fileErrors.duplicate_header: Source column headers must be unique.
fileErrors.too_many_rows: Import at most 500 rows at a time.
fileErrors.row_too_wide: A data row contains more values than the header row.
fileErrors.malformed_csv: The CSV contains an unfinished or invalid quoted value.
fileErrors.workbook_empty: The Excel workbook does not contain a worksheet.

toast.previewError: The file could not be validated
toast.importError: The import could not be completed

products.label: Products and stock
products.description: Catalog, prices, costs, and opening stock.

providers.label: Suppliers
providers.description: Supplier profiles, contacts, and city references.

customerBalances.label: Customer receivables
customerBalances.description: Positive opening balances owed by existing customers.

openingCash.label: Register opening cash
openingCash.description: Reconciled denomination templates for each site register.

fiscalProfiles.label: Fiscal profile
fiscalProfiles.description: Issuer identity, tax regime, and authorized numbering.

issues.city_not_found: City code was not found in this business
issues.duplicate_file_name: Name is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_name: Name already exists in this business
issues.duplicate_file_tax_id: Tax ID is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_tax_id: Tax ID already exists in this business
issues.duplicate_file_email: Email is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_email: Email already exists in this business
issues.concurrent_duplicate: Another import created this record while this import was running
issues.import_failed: The record could not be imported

customers.mapDescription: Confirm the detected customer columns. Name is required; every other field can be left unmapped.
customers.previewDescription: Puntovivo validates every customer and skips repeated tax IDs or email addresses.

template.name: Sample customer
template.notes: Replace this row with your customer data

providers.mapDescription: Confirm the detected supplier columns. Name is required; use the city code from your Puntovivo geography catalog when available.
providers.previewDescription: Puntovivo validates every supplier, checks city codes, and skips repeated names, tax IDs, or email addresses.

customerBalances.mapDescription: Match each opening receivable to an existing customer. Opening balance is required, along with Tax ID or email.
customerBalances.identityRequirement: Map Tax ID or email, plus the opening receivable. Puntovivo matches only active customers in this business.
customerBalances.previewDescription: Puntovivo matches active customers in this business and skips anyone who already has account activity.

issues.identity_required: Tax ID or email is required
issues.balance_must_be_positive: The receivable must be greater than zero
issues.out_of_range: The receivable exceeds the allowed range
issues.customer_not_found: No active customer matches this identity
issues.ambiguous_customer: More than one active customer matches this identity
issues.identifier_conflict: Tax ID and email belong to different customers
issues.duplicate_file_customer: This customer is repeated in the file
issues.duplicate_existing_balance: This customer already has account activity
issues.import_failed: The opening receivable could not be recorded

openingCash.mapDescription: Map the site, register, opening cash, and its denomination breakdown. Every field is required so the imported template starts reconciled.
openingCash.denominationFormatHelp: Write denomination counts as value:count separated by semicolons, for example 50000:2;20000:1. The calculated total must equal opening cash.
openingCash.previewDescription: Puntovivo resolves active sites in this business, rejects active or established registers, and may replace only an untouched zero default.

issues.out_of_range: Opening cash is outside the allowed range
issues.invalid_denominations: Use value:count pairs separated by semicolons
issues.denomination_total_mismatch: The denomination total does not match opening cash
issues.site_not_found: No active site in this business matches this name
issues.ambiguous_site: More than one active site matches this name
issues.duplicate_file_register: This site and register are repeated in the file
issues.duplicate_existing_register: This register already has an established opening template
issues.active_register: This register has an open cash session
issues.concurrent_register_change: This register changed after preview; preview the file again
issues.import_failed: The opening-cash template could not be imported

fiscalProfiles.mapDescription: Map the issuer profile fields available in the source. Country code and tax identifier are always required; Puntovivo validates the remaining requirements for CO, MX, or CL.
fiscalProfiles.countryFieldHelp: Use CO, MX, or CL and include only the profile for this business country. MX uses regime + postal code; CL uses activity + municipality + head-office address; CO uses resolution + authorized range.
fiscalProfiles.previewDescription: Puntovivo validates this file against the canonical {{country}} fiscal pack and never overwrites an established issuer profile.
fiscalProfiles.activationBoundary: Safety boundary: imported fiscal profiles stay disabled. Review the issuer data and activate fiscal emission manually in Company → Fiscal.

issues.unsupported_country: Only CO, MX, and CL fiscal profiles are supported
issues.tenant_country_mismatch: This profile does not match the business country
issues.invalid_tax_identifier: The issuer tax identifier is not valid for this country
issues.invalid_activity_code: The regime or activity code is not in the fiscal catalog
issues.invalid_issue_location: The issue location is not valid for this country
issues.invalid_administrative_area: The administrative area code is not in the fiscal catalog
issues.invalid_number: The numbering value must be a positive integer
issues.invalid_range: The authorized range start cannot exceed its end
issues.invalid_environment: The fiscal environment is not valid for this country
issues.duplicate_file_profile: This country profile is repeated in the file
issues.duplicate_existing_profile: This issuer profile is already configured
issues.existing_profile_conflict: An established issuer profile already exists; review it in Company → Fiscal
issues.concurrent_profile_change: The fiscal profile changed after preview; preview the file again
issues.import_failed: The fiscal profile could not be imported

fiscalProfiles.reportDescription_one: {{count}} fiscal profile imported and left disabled for review.
fiscalProfiles.reportDescription_other: {{count}} fiscal profiles imported and left disabled for review.
fiscalProfiles.activationReminder: Activation is still required. Verify the issuer identity, environment, and numbering before enabling fiscal emission.
